titleStmt.title: SII 26.779: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 779. (A.R. No. 728 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Gōpura of the same temple, right of entrance.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājādhirājadēva II: Year 12, Siṁha (Āvaṇi) ba. 10, Monday Mūlam = 1174 A.D., August 9. The week-day was Friday.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records a sale of 1-1/8 house-site measured by 4-1/2 foot-long rod, by-Pañchanadivāṇa-baṭṭan, son of Śrī-Mādava-baṭṭan of Vaṅgipuram of Śrī-Madhurāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Poygai-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple of [•••••]ḍaiya-mahādēvar of the same place for a sum of 30 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu. It is stated that out of this, 7 kāśu was gifted to the shrine of the dancing god Kūttāḍundēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu paṉniraṇṭāvatu sim
hanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ rājarājavaḷanā
ṭṭup poykaināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīmadhurān=takacaturvvedimaṅkalattu vaṅkipuṟattu [śrīm]ātavapaṭ
ṭan makan pañcanativāṇapaṭṭanen maṉai vilai pra Ivvūr ṭaiya mahā
devar koilil Ādicaṇṭeśvarappiḷḷaiyārkku dāna
cattukku teṟkku melācaṟuti Ayyanār tiruveppan teṟ
Añcāmaṉaiilum Āṟāmaṉaiilum nān vaṅkipuṟattut taṟmā ṟ pakkal vi
yenāy Enṟutāy Irunta veḷḷar muṉ comun Aṇṭanāyakan Uḷḷiṭṭār kuṟi Irunta
maṉai Onṟe Araikkālukku kiḻpāṟkellai teruvukku meṟkum ten pāṟkellai paḷḷic
civikai Uṭaiyān makan Irā[ja]rājatevan Uḷḷiṭṭār maṉaikku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Aka
ḻukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Anandana brahmārāyar Uḷḷiṭṭār maṉaikku teṟkkum Āka Icai
tta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa maṉai kol nālaraiyiṉāl maṉai Oṉṟe Arai
kkālum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvatāna Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu mu
ppatu Ikkācu muppatuṅ koṇṭapaṭi nān kaiyil koṇṭa kācu Irupattumuṉṟu
i var koyilil tirukkūttāṭi Aruḷukiṟa kūttāṭuntevar śrīpaṇ
tta kācu Eḻum Āka kācu muppatum koṇṭu Immaṉai Onṟeyaraik
ka kuṭutten Ādiśaṇṭeśvarapiḷḷaiyārkku pañcanativāṇapaṭṭanen Iv
maṉaivilaipiramāṇam Eḻutinen Ivannukku Imaṉai viṟṟa vaṅkippuṟattu
yāru paṭṭanen Ivaiy En Eḻuttu ... Immaṉai kol nālaraiyināl maṉai Onṟe
araikkālum viṟṟu Ikkācu muppatum koṇṭu Immaṉai viṟṟuk kuṭutten vaṅkipu
ṟattu śrīmātavapaṭṭan makan pañcanativāṇapaṭṭanen Ivai En Eḻuttu ... Ippaṭi
[ va]ṅkipuṟattu kovintapaṭṭanen . Ippaṭi Aṟivenayyakki tiruvempalanaṭa
Ippaṭi Aṟiven kaṇṭeṟṟu tāmayapaṭṭanen . Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu
mātavapaṭṭanen Ivai En Eḻuttu .... Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāṭakattu pañcanativāṇan [ bhaṭṭa] n
makan bhavapūtipaṭṭanen . panmāh[eśvararakṣai .... §]
Digital edition of SII 26.779 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
